The piston is equipped with a seal made of high-quality rubber that is resistant to long-term contact with oil and grease. The extractor is equipped with a venting system that equalizes the pressure under the piston, ensuring smooth and efficient operation. The semi-transparent cylinder makes it easy to check the quantity and condition of the liquid. Ideally suited for use on quad bikes, boats, agricultural technology, industrial gearboxes, cars, caravans and other machines.
